scripts.dev:offline: METRICCANVAS_OFFLINE=1 PLATFORM_ORIGIN=http://localhost:5174 RUNTIME_ORIGIN=http://localhost:5173 VITE_DATA_GATEWAY=mock VITE_PLATFORM_URL=http://localhost:5174 pnpm dev
scripts.build: pnpm --filter canvas build && pnpm --filter platform build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter platform exec svelte-kit sync && vitest run
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/page && tsc --noEmit -p packages/runtime && tsc --noEmit -p packages/data-gateway && tsc --noEmit -p packages/catalog-discovery && tsc --noEmit -p packages/page-lifecycle && tsc --noEmit -p packages/agent-runner && tsc --noEmit -p packages/mcp && tsc --noEmit -p packages/page/tsconfig.test.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/runtime/tsconfig.test.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/data-gateway/tsconfig.test.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/catalog-discovery/tsconfig.test.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/page-lifecycle/tsconfig.test.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/agent-runner/tsconfig.test.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/mcp/tsconfig.test.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/widgets/tsconfig.test.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/platform/tsconfig.test.json && tsc --noEmit -p tools/data-service-sim
scripts.check: pnpm typecheck && pnpm --filter canvas check && pnpm --filter platform check
